description: Phase 21.0 P0: Async Execution Model Coordination - Combined detection of blocking calls, HttpClient misuse, and performance hotpath risks

fixtures.notes: Coordination case: Blocking call (.Result) on Task returned from HttpClient.GetAsync(). Both GCI0016 (blocking) and GCI0039 (HttpClient) should fire with boosted confidence due to coordination.

Coordination case: All three rules fire together - blocking HttpClient call INSIDE a loop. GCI0016 (blocking), GCI0039 (HttpClient), and GCI0044 (loop). Cross-rule confidence boost applies to all pairs.
Coordination case: Thread.Sleep inside async context alongside blocking operations. GCI0044 (Thread.Sleep) and GCI0016 (blocking in async) should be boosted due to coordination.
